prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-FIXEDBLADEAXE-PARENT Product Type: AXE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Full Tang Finish Fixed Blade 8 In Hatchet Axe Description: Add some flare to your decorative weapons collection with the ASR Outdoor 8" Fixed Blade Throwing Axe.

This durable tomahawk is constructed of stainless steel and features a paracord wrapped handle for added grip. The fixed blade is made of a long, continuous forge without any breaks so you don't need to worry about breakage. This strengthens the axe and makes it an ideal tool for throwing.

The tomahawk itself is 8" in length, making it a perfect size for decorative collections or travel. It comes with a durable nylon sheath to protect the blade when not in use, and makes for a great gift for weapons enthusiasts. This is a must-have addition to your blade collection. Search Terms: decorative blades throwing axe wrapped blade stainless steel tomahawk fixed full tang Features: - DECORATIVE DESIGN - Unique Style Finish Tomahawk Perfect for Blade Collectors - COMPACT SIZE - Overall Length 8" | Blade Length 2.5" | Great for Travel or In-house Displays - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Made of Stainless Steel that Wont Rust - NON-SLIP GRIP - Black Paracord Wrapped Handle Adds Comfort and Prevents Slippage - NYLON SHEATH - Comes with Button Snap Sturdy Sheath to Protect Blade When Not in Use === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
